quotes: As the sea breeze hits my lungs, it takes me back to where I belong...
Rent-free living in your head, “RIP” they commented...
Remember this for what it was...
Death stared and I died a thousand times, nightmares left a riot in my mind...
The sun was so low that day...
Delete, rewind, and try to change this state of mind...
Cast the first stone, from behind the throne...
Im just a born again pessimist, i’ll only kick you from the precipice...
I’m standing beneath the meteor, disaster’s breaking down my door...
A libertine stole the keys and drove this machine without me...
Find a little light and hold it close, don’t lose sight of what matters most...
Enough pressure can create a diamond...
We’re all dying to meet our maker, but all our gods have abandoned us...
